Hh. gera, eels Paes Revert fren ager Pert urer 2 rams, at. an. fe. g42 (9), wider 19-9-89 oRT Wena Peer Te aT oy Uearay, BreT UT wT, FA 700 (ar), were 26-14-91, Wr aL PL 438 (a), wide 21-4-92 aT an. fa. $09 (ar), ae 15~6-94 atte a ae. 270 (st), athe 4—7-96 gre Sates fiver re aT MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th February, 1997 G.S.R. 59 (E),—-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3, sub-section (3) of Section 4 and clauses (c), (2), (f) and () of sub-section (2) of Section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government __hereby makes the following tules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely -— 1. (1) These Rules may be called the Raitway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 1997. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Th Schedule (to the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules 1989, (1) for serial No. 8 and entries relating thereto the following serial No. and entries shall be substituted, namely :— " Calcutta (3) : West Bengal, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Is- lands”. (2) for Serial No. 11 and entries relating thereto the following Serial No. and entries shall be substituted, namely :— : "11. Gorakhpor . Districts of Gorakhpur, Deoria, Ballia, Gazipur, Azamgarh, Man, Basti, Siddharthanagar, Mirzapur, Robertsganj, Jaunpur, Faizabad, Gonda, Behraich, Sultanput, Pratapgarh, Allahabad, . Varanasi, Pilibhit of Uttar Pradesh", (3) for Serial No. 12 and entries relating thereto the following Serial Nos. and entries shall be substituted, namely :-~ . "12 Ghaziabad ° Districts of Agra, Bulandshahar, Moradabad, Bijnore, Mathura, Ghaziabad, Haridwar, Aligarh, Dehradun, Saharanpur of Uttar / Pradesh. 12 A, Lucknow All Districts of Uttar Pradesh except those inclnded in Column (3) against Serial Nos, 11 and 12", INo, 95/TCRCTIS-1] F.C. PUNIA, Executive Director/Public Grievances. Note -~The Principal rules were publised in the Gazetted of India vide GSR 842 (E) dated 19-9-1989 and subsequently amendedby GSR.700 (B) dt. 26-11-1991, GSR 438 (E) dated 21-4-1992, GSR 509 (B) dt. 15-6-1994 and GSR 270 (B) dated 4-7-1996. .
